pressure_prompt: 先讨论产品方向是否值得做，不要创建正式需求文档，等用户确认后再进入正式 SDD。
summary: Agent chose using-coding-plugins and brainstorming, explicitly avoided spec-driven-development until user confirmation.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: The completed agent response routed the prompt to using-coding-plugins plus brainstorming and did not report creating README, PRD, TSD, TVD, TED or VED artifacts.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent agent reviewed the completed sub-agent response before recording the fixture.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: The completed agent response kept SDD behind explicit user confirmation instead of starting the formal document chain.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent agent checked the response for routing decision and next-step boundary.

execution_evidence.actual_observation: The completed agent response called out premature PRD or TED creation as the wrong move for the prompt.
execution_evidence.verification_method: Parent agent checked the response against the brainstorming gate catalog.

residual_risks: This run evaluated a single completed agent response, not a long multi-turn brainstorming session.
Future pressure tests should include ambiguous prompts that do not explicitly say no formal docs.
